Thesis: Pioneer in India water & environment management (EPC + Chemicals + Consumer). Structural tailwind from Jal Jeevan Mission, AMRUT 2.0, ZLD mandates. FY26 margin collapse (EBITDA 7.2%) due to Roha plant ramp + GCC disruption. WATCH: Price ₹370 = 41% premium to base IV ₹262. Enter at ₹170-220 or on confirmed margin recovery (EBITDA >9.5% for 2 quarters).
